name: Carbon Tax + Direct Benefit Transfer
description: 15% carbon tax with 70% revenue recycled as monthly cash transfers to bottom 60% of households.

policylab_suggestions.policy_delta: Reduce transfer share to preserve fiscal space for green infrastructure
policylab_suggestions.outcome_improvement: GDP drag reduced to -0.1%; fiscal sustainability ↑
policylab_suggestions.tradeoff: Poor real income gain drops to +0.4%; middle neutral

policylab_suggestions.policy_delta: Allocate 15% revenue to urban/rural transit fare caps
policylab_suggestions.outcome_improvement: CPI impact reduced to 1.5%; poor copc pressure ↓ further
policylab_suggestions.tradeoff: Complex administration; delays rural cash disbursement

provenance.confidence_note: Illustrative scenario using simplified CGE logic. Full multi-market equilibration pending.
